index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Breakout</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#07071a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh;flex-direction:column}canvas{display:block;cursor:none}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=400;
const ROWS=5,COLS=8,BW=66,BH=18,BPAD=4;
const ROW_COLORS=['#ef5350','#ff7043','#ffca28','#66bb6a','#42a5f5'];
let balls,paddle,bricks,lives,score,gameOver,won,powerups;
function init(){
  paddle={x:250,w:80,h=10,y:370};
  balls=[{x:300,y:340,vx:3,vy:-4}];
  lives=3;score=0;gameOver=false;won=false;powerups=[];
  bricks=[];
  for(let r=0;r<ROWS;r++)for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++){
    bricks.push({x:c*(BW+BPAD)+8,y:r*(BH+BPAD)+40,alive:true,row:r});
  }
}
let mx=300;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
  const rect=cv.getBoundingClientRect();
  mx=e.clientX-rect.left;
});
let keys={};
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{keys[e.key]=true;});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>{keys[e.key]=false;});
function update(){
  if(gameOver||won)return;
  if(keys['ArrowLeft'])mx=Math.max(mx-5,0);
  if(keys['ArrowRight'])mx=Math.min(mx+5,600);
  paddle.x=Math.max(0,Math.min(W-paddle.w,mx-paddle.w/2));
  powerups=powerups.filter(p=>{
    p.y+=2;
    if(p.y+10>=paddle.y&&p.y<=paddle.y+paddle.h&&p.x+12>=paddle.x&&p.x<=paddle.x+paddle.w){
      if(p.type==='wide'){paddle.w=Math.min(paddle.w+30,140);setTimeout(()=>{paddle.w=Math.max(80,paddle.w-30);},6000);}
      if(p.type==='multi'){const b0=balls[0];balls.push({x:b0.x,y:b0.y,vx:-b0.vx,vy:b0.vy});balls.push({x:b0.x,y:b0.y,vx:b0.vx*0.8,vy:b0.vy});}
      if(p.type==='life'){lives=Math.min(lives+1,5);}
      return false;
    }
    return p.y<H;
  });
  balls=balls.filter(ball=>{
    ball.x+=ball.vx;ball.y+=ball.vy;
    if(ball.x<=5||ball.x>=W-5)ball.vx=-ball.vx;
    if(ball.y<=5)ball.vy=-ball.vy;
    if(ball.y>=paddle.y&&ball.y<=paddle.y+paddle.h&&ball.x>=paddle.x&&ball.x<=paddle.x+paddle.w&&ball.vy>0){
      ball.vy=-Math.abs(ball.vy);
      ball.vx+=(ball.x-(paddle.x+paddle.w/2))*0.05;
    }
    bricks.forEach(b=>{
      if(!b.alive)return;
      if(ball.x+5>b.x&&ball.x-5<b.x+BW&&ball.y+5>b.y&&ball.y-5<b.y+BH){
        b.alive=false;score+=10*(ROWS-b.row);
        ball.vy=-ball.vy;
        const r=Math.random();
        if(r<0.08)powerups.push({x:b.x+BW/2,y:b.y,type:'wide'});
        else if(r<0.14)powerups.push({x:b.x+BW/2,y:b.y,type:'multi'});
        else if(r<0.18)powerups.push({x:b.x+BW/2,y:b.y,type:'life'});
      }
    });
    if(ball.y>H){return false;}
    return true;
  });
  if(balls.length===0){lives--;if(lives<=0){gameOver=true;}else{balls=[{x:paddle.x+paddle.w/2,y:paddle.y-10,vx:3*(Math.random()>0.5?1:-1),vy:-4}];}}
  if(bricks.every(b=>!b.alive))won=true;
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#07071a';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  bricks.forEach(b=>{
    if(!b.alive)return;
    ctx.fillStyle=ROW_COLORS[b.row];
    ctx.fillRect(b.x,b.y,BW,BH);
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
    ctx.fillRect(b.x+1,b.y+1,BW-2,6);
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
    ctx.fillRect(b.x,b.y+BH-3,BW,3);
  });
  powerups.forEach(p=>{
    ctx.fillStyle=p.type==='wide'?'#2196f3':p.type==='multi'?'#ffd600':'#f44336';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,6,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='8px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(p.type==='wide'?'W':p.type==='multi'?'M':'L',p.x,p.y+3);
  });
  const pg=ctx.createLinearGradient(paddle.x,paddle.y,paddle.x,paddle.y+paddle.h);
  pg.addColorStop(0,'#b0bec5');pg.addColorStop(1,'#546e7a');
  ctx.fillStyle=pg;
  ctx.fillRect(paddle.x,paddle.y,paddle.w,paddle.h);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';
  ctx.fillRect(paddle.x+2,paddle.y,paddle.w-4,4);
  balls.forEach(ball=>{
    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowColor='#fff';ctx.shadowBlur=12;
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ball.x,ball.y,5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 16px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,20);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('Lives: '+lives,590,20);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.font='10px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('Mouse or Arrow keys to move',300,395);
  if(gameOver||won){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.75)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillStyle=won?'#ffd600':'#f44336';
    ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';
    ctx.fillText(won?'YOU WIN!':'GAME OVER',W/2,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='24px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,240);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='16px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Reload page to play again',W/2,290);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
